examples.title: Backpropagation
examples.description: A simple implementation of the backpropagation algorithm in pseudocode.
examples.code:
INPUT: input data, labels
OUTPUT: trained model

FOR each epoch:
  FOR each example in input data:
    FORWARD PASS:
      compute output of each layer
    BACKWARD PASS:
      compute gradients of loss function with respect to model parameters
    WEIGHT UPDATES:
      update model parameters using gradients and learning rate
  END FOR
END FOR
examples.explanation: This pseudocode illustrates the basic steps of the backpropagation algorithm, including the forward pass, backward pass, and weight updates.
